LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR: RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY DID NOT TIMELY FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE MOTION. (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1300(C).) BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY FILED PROOF OF SERVICE ON DECEMBER 5, 2013, WHICH IS THREE COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Application And Hearing For: Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S Application And Hearing For: Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Off calendar. BiRite Restaurant Supply did not timely file proof of service for the motion. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) BiRite Restaurant Supply filed proof of service on December 5, 2013, which is three court days prior to the hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
